---
title: "Bug Report"
date: today
params:
  title: "Untitled Bug"
  nf_version: ""
  executor: "local"
  command: ""
  error: ""
  config: ""
  context: ""
format: gfm
engine: knitr
---

# Bug Report: `r params$title`

**Date:** `r Sys.Date()`
**Nextflow version:** `r params$nf_version`
**Executor:** `r params$executor`

---

## Description

<!-- What went wrong? Be specific about which step or process failed. -->

## Command Used

```bash
`r params$command`
```

## Error Output

<!-- Paste from .nextflow.log or work/xx/yyyy*/.command.err -->

```
`r params$error`
```

## Config / Profile

<!-- Paste only the relevant sections — process resources, executor settings, param overrides -->

```groovy
`r params$config`
```

## Additional Context

`r params$context`

---

*Generated with the Quarto GitHub Issue Framework. Submit via `gh issue create --title "<title>" --label "bug" --body-file <this_file>.md`*
